recommendations.title: The Thinning
recommendations.overview: In a post-apocalyptic future where population control is dictated by a high-school aptitude test, two students discover the test is smoke and mirrors hiding a larger conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Smiley
recommendations.overview: After learning of an urban legend in which a demented serial killer named SMILEY can be summoned through the internet, mentally fragile Ashley must decide whether she is losing her mind or becoming Smiley's next victim.

recommendations.title: The Package
recommendations.overview: Experienced Green Beret sergeant Johnny Gallagher is escorting a prisoner, Airborne Ranger Thomas Boyette, back to the US, but Boyette escapes and Gallagher must risk life and limb to catch him.

recommendations.title: The Young Offenders
recommendations.overview: Two teenage boys from inner-city Cork steal bicycles and ride off on a 160km quest to find an unrecovered bale of cocaine worth 7,000,000 euros.

recommendations.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
recommendations.overview: After an encounter with UFOs, an electricity linesman feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

recommendations.title: BlacKkKlansman
recommendations.overview: Colorado Springs, late 1970s. Ron Stallworth, an African American police officer, and Flip Zimmerman, his Jewish colleague, run an undercover operation to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan.

recommendations.title: Absence of Malice
recommendations.overview: Megan Carter is a reporter duped into running an untrue story on Michael Gallagher, a suspected racketeer. He has an alibi for the time his crime was allegedly committed—but it involves an innocent party. When he tells Carter the truth and the newspa

recommendations.title: Interstate 60
recommendations.overview: An aspiring painter meets various characters and learns valuable lessons while traveling across America.

recommendations.title: Rocketman
recommendations.overview: The story of Elton John's life, from his years as a prodigy at the Royal Academy of Music through his influential and enduring musical partnership with Bernie Taupin.

recommendations.title: Split Second
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Action, Crime, Thriller, Horror
recommendations.overview: In a flooded future London, Detective Harley Stone hunts a serial killer who murdered his partner and has haunted him ever since — but he soon discovers what he is hunting might not be human.
